name: Shake 'n' Smoke Ribs (How-to)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all mop ingredients in a bowl and mix thoroughly.
2. Prepare the dry rub by mixing all rub ingredients in a ziplock bag until well combined.
3. Rub the mixture evenly over ribs, then store in refrigerator overnight.
4. Fire up smoker and preheat to desired temperature range (180-250°F).
5. Make the mop sauce: Sauté onion and garlic in oil until golden brown, then add remaining sauce ingredients. Simmer for 30 minutes.
6. Place ribs on grill over a pan of cold water. Smoke for about 2 hours, covered and undisturbed.
7. Open smoker lid, baste ribs with mop sauce, checking coals and water level as needed. Add wood for smoke if necessary.
8. Continue cooking ribs uncovered for 3 more hours, turning and basting after 1 hour and again at 2-hour mark.
9. Final mop: Apply final coat of mop sauce about 10 minutes before serving.
10. Serve with dipping bowls of extra sauce and plenty of napkins. Enjoy!
